long_desc: An old Lonoyan man sweeps the road clean.
detailed_desc:
Too old to wield a glaive, this man has taken upon himself the task of
picking up the litter that passerby drop in Lonoyan gutters. Ofingia,
the "Jewel of Lonoya", would not sparkle as it does in Korbor's crown
if he was not so busy. The old man really hates adventurers who don't
clean up after themselves.
